name: CATIA
description: Dassault Systemes' premium CAD/CAM/CAE platform. The standard for complex aerospace vehicle design — used to design the Airbus A380, Boeing 787, and most European launch vehicles. Handles large assemblies with thousands of parts.
whyUseIt: CATIA is purpose-built for aerospace-scale complexity. Its surface modelling, composite layup tools, and multi-site collaboration features make it essential for programmes where hundreds of engineers work on the same vehicle simultaneously.

vocabulary.definition: Digital Mock-Up — a complete virtual assembly of the entire vehicle for interference checking
AI-driven design optimisation that generates lightweight structures based on load requirements

beginnerMistakes: Underestimating the learning curve — CATIA is powerful but complex
Not using the collaboration tools for multi-engineer projects
Creating models that are not parametrically linked
